suggestions: Incorporate more quantifiable achievements using the STAR methodology.
Add direct links to your project repositories to verify code quality.
improvementTips: Quantify your experience bullets with metrics like % improvement, hours saved, or revenue generated.
Format dates and section headers consistently for cleaner visual parsing.

skillGap.actionableFeedback: As a student, focus on building and deploying 2-3 robust full-stack projects. Host them live and add verification links. Highlight university leadership roles or group project coordination to build your collaboration metrics.
